'''Barbara Hambly''' is an award-winning and prolific American novelist and the author of the ''Star Wars'' novels [[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] and ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in 1995 and 1997, respectively. She also wrote short stories for ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' and ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'', also published by Bantam Spectra in 1995, and for the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', which was published by [[West End Games]] in 1997.

==Works==
===Novels===
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] (1995)
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' (1997)
===Short stories===
*{{StoryCite|story=Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} (1995)
*{{StoryCite|story=Taster's Choice: The Tale of Jabba's Chef|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} (1995)
*{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime}} (1997)
